requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Rwanda's EV charging infrastructure, guided by RSB adoption of IEC standards, follows the IEC 62196 connector ecosystem for four-wheel passenger and commercial vehicle charging. AC charging uses the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler; DC fast charging uses the Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2), defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF. IEC 62196 connector conformity is a technical interoperability requirement for compatibility with imported IEC-standard EVs that are entering Rwanda's nascent four-wheel EV market. Important context: as of 2026, Rwanda's dominant EV segment is electric motorcycles (e-motos) using proprietary battery-swap connectors (Ampersand battery-swap system, Spiro battery-swap system) — these are not IEC 62196 applications. The IEC 62196 four-wheel conductive charging market in Rwanda is at an early deployment stage; confirmed public charging-network operators and formal IEC 62196 deployment at scale have not been publicly confirmed from official Rwandan sources as of 2026-06-14.
summary.zh: 卢旺达电动汽车充电基础设施遵循RSB采用的IEC标准，四轮乘用车和商用车充电采用IEC 62196接口体系。交流充电使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器；直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。IEC 62196接口符合性是与进入卢旺达初期四轮电动汽车市场的IEC标准电动汽车兼容的技术互操作要求。重要背景：截至2026年，卢旺达主导电动汽车细分市场为使用专有电池换电接口的电动摩托车（安培桑德电池换电系统、斯皮罗电池换电系统），这些不属于IEC 62196的适用场景。卢旺达IEC 62196四轮传导充电市场处于早期部署阶段；截至2026年6月14日，尚未从官方来源确认已有公共充电网络运营商及规模化IEC 62196部署的公开信息。
summary.zht: 盧旺達電動汽車充電基礎設施遵循RSB採用的IEC標準，四輪乘用車和商用車充電採用IEC 62196接口體系。交流充電使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器；直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。IEC 62196接口符合性是與進入盧旺達初期四輪電動汽車市場的IEC標準電動汽車兼容的技術互操作要求。重要背景：截至2026年，盧旺達主導電動汽車細分市場為使用專有電池換電接口的電動摩托車（安培桑德電池換電系統、斯皮羅電池換電系統），這些不屬於IEC 62196的適用場景。盧旺達IEC 62196四輪傳導充電市場處於早期部署階段；截至2026年6月14日，尚未從官方來源確認已有公共充電網絡運營商及規模化IEC 62196部署的公開信息。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
RSB (Rwanda Standards Board) — IEC standard adoption programme

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus via GB/T 27930 communication, incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack. Rwanda's imported passenger EVs are predominantly IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 vehicles; a GB/T charger cannot charge these vehicles without hardware redesign.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。卢旺达进口乘用电动汽车主要为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2车辆；GB/T充电桩在未进行硬件重新设计的情况下无法为这些车辆充电。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。盧旺達進口乘用電動汽車主要為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2車輛；GB/T充電樁在未進行硬體重新設計的情況下無法為這些車輛充電。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Type 2 / CCS2 Rwanda deployments. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required), labels, test reports, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-part strategy. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector design. Exporters should also note that the dominant Rwanda e-mobility market (electric motorcycles) uses battery-swap rather than conductive charging; IEC 62196 four-wheel charger projects should be confirmed with local operators and RURA before quoting.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于卢旺达Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（在要求时从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告、温升证据及备件策略进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。出口商还须注意，卢旺达电动出行市场的主导部分（电动摩托车）采用电池换电而非传导充电；IEC 62196四轮充电桩项目在报价前应与本地运营商和RURA确认。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於盧旺達Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（在要求時從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據及備件策略進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。出口商還須注意，盧旺達電動出行市場的主導部分（電動摩托車）採用電池換電而非傳導充電；IEC 62196四輪充電樁項目在報價前應與本地運營商和RURA確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by project specification, network operator, or RSB-aligned procurement; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign; confirm active project demand and RURA operator licensing before quoting
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Confirm whether the Rwanda deployment requires IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before quoting, labelling, or shipping. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa. The dominant Rwanda e-moto battery-swap segment is a separate market not addressed by IEC 62196 four-wheel charger standards.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。在报价、贴标或发货前，应确认卢旺达部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。卢旺达占主导地位的电动摩托车电池换电细分市场是独立市场，IEC 62196四轮充电桩标准不适用于该细分市场。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。在報價、貼標或發貨前，應確認盧旺達部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。盧旺達佔主導地位的電動摩托車電池換電細分市場是獨立市場，IEC 62196四輪充電樁標準不適用於該細分市場。
